title: U.S. targets China’s shadow trade with Iran in sweeping sanctions
summary_full: Ahead of a Trump-Xi summit, Washington widens its crackdown on secretive oil and chemical trade between Beijing and Tehran.
summary_public: Ahead of a Trump-Xi summit, Washington widens its crackdown on secretive oil and chemical trade between Beijing and Tehran.
